title: anthemis montana subsp. aetnensis
intro: Anthemis montana subsp. aetnensis, also known as Aetna mountain chamomile, is a subspecies of Anthemis montana, a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been traditionally used to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety, and promote relaxation. The health benefits of Aetna mountain chamomile include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, insomnia, and skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Aetna mountain chamomile may include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to calm the mind and body, as well as to ease digestive discomfort.
